title: Shay — Omnipresent Virtual Assistant
summary: Build Shay from a Telegram-only assistant into a true omnipresent virtual assistant: manager-grade, with a virtual body (avatar/voice/persona), reachable everywhere Fritz is — smartphone, web, voice (Alexa/Google), smartwatch (watchOS/WearOS), and AR/smart glasses — and able to reach him first across all of them. Working assumption: the exact assistant Fritz wants does NOT exist as one product; it exists only in pieces, so we compose it on top of the existing Shay runtime (Hermes-based, ~/.shay/).
research_first: docs/shay-fritz-ready/VIRTUAL-ASSISTANT-LANDSCAPE.md (in progress) maps existing products, open-source building blocks, the reach/notification fabric, and virtual-body options, then recommends a build-on stack.
phases: P1 Reach fabric — one service that delivers to push/SMS/voice/Telegram/email/Alexa/wearable/glasses with channel fallback.
P2 Virtual body — avatar + voice + persona, cost/latency-aware.
P3 Ubiquity — wearables and smart glasses within platform limits.
known_gaps: Device-platform lock-ins (Apple/Meta/Amazon) will limit some reach channels — to be characterized by the research before committing to a channel.
Virtual-body (real-time avatar/voice) cost and latency are unproven for always-on use — needs the P2 tradeoff study.
